questions.text: [StartupInc] A man is looking at a photograph of someone. His friend asks who it is. The man replies, "Brothers and sisters, I have none. But that man's father is my father's son." Who is in the photograph?
[StartupInc] If 20% of a = b, then b% of 20 is the same as:
[StartupInc] Which data structure follows LIFO principle?
[StartupInc] Which keyword is used to create a subclass in Java?
[StartupInc] If 1st January 2001 was a Monday, what day was 1st January 2002?
[StartupInc] A train 120m long passes a telegraph post in 6 seconds. Find its speed in km/hr.
[StartupInc] What is the size of int in Java?
[StartupInc] In Python, how do you start a block of code?
[StartupInc] Pointing to a lady, a man said, "The son of her only brother is the brother of my wife." How is the lady related to the man?
[StartupInc] A vendor bought toffees at 6 for a rupee. How many for a rupee must he sell to gain 20%?
[StartupInc] Which of the following is not a pillar of OOP?
[StartupInc] Which header file is used for input/output in C++?
[StartupInc] In a certain code, COMPUTER is written as RFUVQNPC. How is MEDICINE written?
[StartupInc] The average of 7 consecutive numbers is 20. The largest of these numbers is:
[StartupInc] In SQL, which command is used to remove all records from a table but keep the structure?
[StartupInc] What is the output of 2 + "2" in JavaScript?
[StartupInc] Find the missing number in the series: 2, 6, 12, 20, 30, ?
[StartupInc] A sum of money at compound interest amounts to thrice itself in 3 years. In how many years will it be 9 times itself?
[StartupInc] Which of the following is used for managing state in React?
[StartupInc] What does the 'typeof' operator return for an array in JS?
